Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Judges]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Judges are members of the Abidan Court.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Judges are a type of Abidan allowed autonomy when responding to spatial or temporal violations.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The two Judges took the path in Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Judges are a group of beings that can be linked across time and space by Telariel.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Judges have never made an open call like Suriel's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Judges are entities that Fiends of Chaos are powerful enough to contend with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The Judges are responsible for keeping the Vroshir locked down.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — The Judges are unable to travel directly into the Hall of Judgment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Ozriel has hidden from the Judges for centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Judges can only focus their full power on one world at a time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Judges are a group of beings that move to check Vroshir advances in different Sectors.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Judges were engaged in a fight with the Mad King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — There are three Judges present in the Iteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Two Judges arranged for the protection of Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Judges are a group that includes Eithan.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Judges are said to retire when their job is finished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Judges reinforced the stability of the Iteration with their presence.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
